name: apub-demo
description: Demo app for survos/activity-pub-bundle — a decoupled ActivityPub federation bundle for Symfony

dokku.predeploy: bin/console importmap:install && bin/console asset-map:compile && bin/console doctrine:migrations:migrate -n --allow-no-migration
dokku.postdeploy: bin/console about && bin/console survos:user:create demo@example.com demo1234

SECRET_TOKEN.description: A secret key for verifying the integrity of signed cookies.

WEB_CONCURRENCY.description: The number of processes to run.
